classData.summary: Reads the live daemon data directory from AiConfig at use time.
classData.name: getDaemonDataDir

classData.summary: Ensures the live daemon data directory exists and returns it.
classData.name: ensureDaemonDataDir

classData.summary: Resolves the live embed daemon log file path.
classData.name: getLogFile

classData.summary: Resolves the live embed daemon PID file path.
classData.name: getPidFile

classData.comment:
/**
 * Rotates `embed-daemon.log` if its mtime falls on a calendar day different from today's.
 * Renames the previous-day file to `embed-daemon.log.YYYY-MM-DD` so the active file always
 * holds the current day's lines. Best-effort: failures surface to stderr and the daemon
 * continues (log integrity is not allowed to gate daemon liveness).
 * @protected
 */
classData.description: Rotates embed-daemon.log if its mtime falls on a calendar day different from today's. Renames the previous-day file to embed-daemon.log.YYYY-MM-DD so the active file always holds the current day's lines. Best-effort: failures surface to stderr and the daemon continues (log integrity is not allowed to gate daemon liveness).
classData.name: rotateLogIfNewDay

classData.comment:
/**
 * Prunes archived log files (`embed-daemon.log.*`) older than `LOG_RETENTION_DAYS` from
 * `DAEMON_DATA_DIR`. Runs once at daemon startup. Best-effort: per-file unlink failures
 * are silently swallowed (better to keep a stale archive than gate startup).
 * @protected
 */
classData.description: Prunes archived log files (embed-daemon.log.*) older than LOG_RETENTION_DAYS from DAEMON_DATA_DIR. Runs once at daemon startup. Best-effort: per-file unlink failures are silently swallowed (better to keep a stale archive than gate startup).
classData.name: pruneOldLogs

classData.comment:
/**
 * Persistent + console log writer. Writes a single line to BOTH stdout (live terminal
 * observability) AND the persistent `embed-daemon.log` file (post-hoc audit trail).
 * Format: `[ISO-timestamp] [PID:NNN] [LEVEL] message`. Daily rotation is checked on every call.
 *
 * Failures on file-write are silently swallowed — daemon liveness MUST NOT depend on log
 * integrity. Failures on console-write propagate naturally.
 *
 * @param {String} level   One of 'INFO' | 'ERROR'.
 * @param {String} message Message body without trailing newline — `writeLog` appends one.
 * @protected
 */
classData.description:
Persistent + console log writer. Writes a single line to BOTH stdout (live terminal observability) AND the persistent embed-daemon.log file (post-hoc audit trail). Format: [ISO-timestamp] [PID:NNN] [LEVEL] message. Daily rotation is checked on every call.

Failures on file-write are silently swallowed — daemon liveness MUST NOT depend on log integrity. Failures on console-write propagate naturally.

params.description: Message body without trailing newline — writeLog appends one.
params.name: message

classData.name: writeLog

classData.comment:
/**
 * Enforces the one-instance-per-data-dir singleton contract: takes over from a live prior
 * instance (SIGTERM → 3s grace → SIGKILL), ignores recycled PIDs owned by foreign processes,
 * claims the PID file atomically (`wx`), and installs exit/signal cleanup. Mirrors the wake
 * daemon's lock verbatim — an interrupted drain cycle is safe by WAL construction, so cleanup
 * exits immediately rather than awaiting the in-flight cycle.
 * @protected
 */
classData.description: Enforces the one-instance-per-data-dir singleton contract: takes over from a live prior instance (SIGTERM → 3s grace → SIGKILL), ignores recycled PIDs owned by foreign processes, claims the PID file atomically (wx), and installs exit/signal cleanup. Mirrors the wake daemon's lock verbatim — an interrupted drain cycle is safe by WAL construction, so cleanup exits immediately rather than awaiting the in-flight cycle.
classData.name: enforceSingleton
